title: AdminSDHolder ACL Modification for Persistence
description: Detects modification of the AdminSDHolder container ACL (or dsacls against it) to plant a backdoor that SDProp re-applies to all protected groups every 60 minutes, granting durable privileged access to Domain Admins and similar.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Command Line' like '*AdminSDHolder*') and (('Command Line' like '*dsacls*' or 'Command Line' like '*Add-DomainObjectAcl*' or 'Command Line' like '*/G *' or 'Command Line' like '*GenericAll*' or 'Command Line' like '*Set-Acl*')))
